test_cases.title: Member role user receives access denied response on admin URL
preconditions: User is logged in with the member role
steps: Navigate directly to the admin dashboard URL
Observe the HTTP response or UI message
test_cases.expected_result: Access is denied with a 403 Forbidden response or equivalent access-denied message

test_cases.title: Member user is redirected to their own dashboard after denied admin access
preconditions: User is logged in with the member role
steps: Attempt to navigate to the admin dashboard URL
Observe where the browser is taken after the denial
test_cases.expected_result: The user is redirected to their personal dashboard; the admin area is not visible

test_cases.title: Unauthorised admin access attempt is recorded in the audit log
preconditions: User is logged in with the member role
steps: Attempt to access the admin dashboard URL
Log in as an administrator and review the audit log
test_cases.expected_result: An audit log entry is created recording the user identity, target URL, and timestamp of the attempt

notes: Three separate test cases map to the three explicit outcomes in the requirement: access denied, redirect, and audit log entry.
